text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After doing some shopping<n>downtown, I start
making my way<n>back home.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Carrots... G-get yourcarrots here... Delicious... carrots...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wha?! O-oh, it's you...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Well... The grocer is a friend of mine...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, the store is short-staffed,<n>so I
offered to help...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But I really messed up when I wasordering more stock and mistyped thenumber of units we needed... by twowhole digits. Sob...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what I'm going to do<n>with all these
carrots...
choice_data_list: Let's see if Tracen is interested in taking them.

You'll have better luck hawking carrots where
it's more crowded.

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Approved! Tazuna double-checked<n>the numbers,
and this is well within<n>our budget!

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Stocking up on our reserves is never<n>a bad thing
and would be a huge help!<n>Please bring them to
the academy at<n>once!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you. I would have never<n>thought to ask
the school...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'll take them all there now!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: H-hup! Wh-whoaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Together, Meisho Doto and I take the<n>huge pile
of carrots to school.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, that makes sense... I'll try my<n>best to get
more people to come...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Carrots... Get your carrots here...<n>Fresh, yummy...
Eep!

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text: Are you all right, dearie?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yes. Um, would you like some fresh<n>carrots?

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text:
Why, aren't you just the hardest<n>worker? I think
I will have some, yes.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Struck by how earnestly Meisho Doto<n>is working
despite her blunder, people<n>passing by begin to
make their way to<n>the store by the dozen.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Phew... Seems like we managed to<n>sell them all.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Running around while watching where<n>most
people were headed kind of<n>reminded me of
being in a race...
